phase_name: Webhook Ingress, Outbound Notifications, and Operator Visibility

remaining_tasks.name: Execute 12-03 outbound destination and command surface
Execute 12-04 outbound delivery worker and retry semantics
Execute 12-05 mounted webhook UI and accessibility
Execute 12-06 phase verifier and route docs

blockers.description: The worktree is already heavily dirty with many pre-existing modified and untracked files outside Phase 12, including generated docs, build outputs, and historical planning artifacts.
blockers.workaround: When resuming, scope work tightly to Phase 12 files and verify targets with git status before staging or reverting anything.

blockers.description: Historical placeholder planning artifacts exist in older phase directories.
blockers.workaround: Do not treat grep hits for placeholder content in legacy phase docs as Phase 12 blockers unless the work explicitly returns to those phases.

decisions.decision: Expanded Phase 12 from 4 plans to 6 plans.
decisions.rationale: The checker found missing ingress-edge coverage and an overpacked outbound slice; splitting the phase produced executable, phase-bounded plans.

decisions.decision: Made 12-01 explicitly own the library-managed Plug/router ingress boundary.
decisions.rationale: The planning checker flagged that verifier/domain work alone did not satisfy HOOK-01 without raw-body capture, fail-closed 401 behavior, telemetry, and HTTP-level tests.

decisions.decision: Separated outbound contracts, outbound delivery execution, mounted UI, and verifier/docs into distinct plans.
decisions.rationale: This reduced plan density and preserved CI-readable, scripts-first verification without speculative scope creep.

next_action: Start Phase 12 execution with 12-01 by implementing the inbound receipt/replay schema, verifier boundary, ingress Plug, and HTTP-level fail-closed tests.
context_notes: Phase 12 planning is complete and checker-reviewed. The substantive planning failures were already corrected: ingress-edge HTTP handling is now explicit, and the original outbound/UI slices were decomposed into six bounded plans. Resume by reading the Phase 12 context and 12-01 plan carefully, then work narrowly because the repo already contains many unrelated dirty files.
